pokemon:urshifu.name: Urshifu
pokemon:urshifu.summary: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.
This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.

pokemon:kubfu.name: Kubfu
pokemon:kubfu.summary: If Kubfu pulls the long white hair on its head, its fighting spirit heightens and power wells up from the depths of its belly.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: If Kubfu pulls the long white hair on its head, its fighting spirit heightens and power wells up from the depths of its belly.
Kubfu trains hard to perfect its moves. The moves it masters will determine which form it takes when it evolves.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: If Kubfu pulls the long white hair on its head, its fighting spirit heightens and power wells up from the depths of its belly.
